Home.title: Semakan Kendiri Pematuhan China | Pematuhan SinoTrade
Home.description: Semak sama ada produk anda memerlukan pendaftaran GACC, pensijilan CCC atau pemfailan NMPA untuk eksport ke China.
Home.heroSubtitle: Ketahui dalam 3 langkah keperluan pematuhan yang dikenakan pada produk anda sebelum mengeksport ke China.
Home.step1Desc: Isikan kategori, asal dan butiran produk
Home.step2Desc: Keputusan segera — tiada bayaran atau pendaftaran diperlukan
Home.step3Desc: Bayar $0.99 untuk laporan pematuhan yang komprehensif
Home.monthlyDesc: Laporan tanpa had selama satu bulan
Home.metaDescription: Check if your product needs GACC registration, CCC certification, or NMPA filing for export to China.

Check.noAction: Tiada tindakan pematuhan diperlukan pada masa ini
Check.getFullReportDesc: Lengkapkan laporan dengan semua dokumen yang diperlukan, garis masa dan langkah seterusnya.
Check.oneTimePayment: Bayaran sekali sahaja. Laporan dihantar melalui web + e-mel.
Check.expertCtaDesc: Pakar pematuhan kami boleh mengendalikan keseluruhan proses pendaftaran untuk anda.
Check.expertCtaBtn: Dapatkan Sebut Harga daripada Pakar Kami →
Check.reportCtaDesc: Our compliance experts will provide a tailored plan and pricing for your specific product.
Check.cccMetaDescription: Check if your product requires China CCC certification. Free compliance assessment for electronics, machinery, and other CCC-controlled products.
Check.gaccMetaTitle: GACC Food Registration Check | SinoTrade Compliance
Check.gaccMetaDescription: Check if your food product requires GACC Decree 248 registration for China import. Free compliance assessment tool.
Check.labelMetaTitle: Chinese Label Compliance Check | SinoTrade Compliance
Check.labelMetaDescription: Check if your product needs a Chinese label for sale in China. Free compliance assessment for food, cosmetics, and consumer goods.
Check.nmpaMetaTitle: NMPA Cosmetics Filing Check | SinoTrade Compliance
Check.nmpaMetaDescription: Check if your cosmetics product requires NMPA filing for China. Free compliance assessment with instant results.
Check.crossborderMetaDescription: Check cross-border e-commerce compliance requirements for your products entering China. Free assessment tool.
Check.trademarkMetaTitle: China Trademark Protection Check | SinoTrade Compliance
Check.trademarkMetaDescription: Check brand protection needs for the Chinese market. Free compliance assessment for trademark registration and IP protection.
Check.gaccDesc: Check if your food product needs GACC Decree 248 registration for China import.
Check.labelDesc: Verify your product label meets Chinese GB standards for food, cosmetics, and consumer goods.
Check.cccDesc: Find out if your product requires China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for import.
Check.nmpaDesc: Determine if your cosmetics or skincare products need NMPA registration or filing.
Check.crossborderDesc: Check compliance requirements for cross-border e-commerce via Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, or WeChat.
Check.trademarkDesc: Assess your trademark registration and brand protection needs in China.
